title: Complete detail panel routes and checklist
description: Finish the MVP detail panel by showing alternatives, terminal continuation routes, citation/source badges, and an internal validation checklist. The panel must keep downstream route choices shallow and must let pointer and keyboard users complete local checklist items.
action: Extend the detail panel to render data-backed alternatives, source badges, stop/quality/knowledge continuation routes, and a local validation checklist with accessible checkbox controls.
implementation: Render current-step alternatives in the detail panel only, with labels explaining why they are not the recommended command.
Render source badges from citation data using explicit statuses for command definitions, guide docs, and Codex skill mirrors; do not add source badges on SVG nodes.

Render terminal continuation route buttons or cards labeled `Stop`, `Quality Pipeline`, and `Knowledge Capture` only when the active step is terminal, without expanding quality or knowledge pipeline internals.
Add checklist state keyed by validation checklist item id and render accessible checkbox inputs that can be toggled by pointer and keyboard.
Display local validation results from `validateScenarioReferences` and `validateCitationCoverage`, including a zero-error state when both arrays are empty.
Add CSS classes for source badges, terminal routes, alternatives, and checklist states while preserving the existing responsive layout.

criteria: [UI-observable] The detail panel displays alternatives and source status badges while the SVG map remains focused on active path highlighting.
[UI-observable] At a closing node, the detail panel shows `Stop`, `Quality Pipeline`, and `Knowledge Capture` route labels without rendering downstream pipeline steps.
[UI-observable] Checklist checkboxes can be toggled by pointer and keyboard, and the completed count changes on screen.
`grep -n "Quality Pipeline" src/main.tsx`, `grep -n "Knowledge Capture" src/main.tsx`, and `grep -n "Stop" src/main.tsx` all return matches.
`grep -n "source-badge" src/styles.css`, `grep -n "validation-checklist" src/styles.css`, and `grep -n "continuation-route" src/styles.css` all return matches.
`npm run build` exits with status 0 after detail-panel completion.
